title: IDC Annual Report and Financial Statements FY2024
description: IDC consolidated annual report including audited financial statements, portfolio performance review, governance report, and sustainability highlights for the financial year ended 31 December 2024.

title: IDC Portfolio Performance Report Q1 2025
description: Quarterly portfolio performance report covering financial results, risk indicators, compliance status, and strategic updates for all IDC portfolio companies for Q1 2025.

title: IDC Privatisation Programme — Transaction Advisor Reports
description: Transaction advisor reports for two portfolio companies identified for divestiture under the MoF-DIR-2024-005 privatisation programme. Contains valuation analysis, market sounding results, and recommended transaction structures.

title: ZESCO ERB Tariff Application — Supporting Documentation
description: ZESCO's formal tariff application to the Energy Regulation Board including cost-of-service study, revenue requirement analysis, and proposed tariff structure for the 2025-2028 regulatory period.

title: Zambia Railways Track Rehabilitation Phase 1 — Contract Documents
description: Executed contract documents for the Livingstone-Mazabuka track rehabilitation Phase 1, including scope of works, bill of quantities, performance milestones, and payment schedule.

title: IDC ESG Strategy 2025-2030
description: IDC's five-year ESG strategy covering environmental stewardship, social impact, and governance excellence across the IDC portfolio. Aligned with Zambia's National Development Plan and the UN Sustainable Development Goals.

title: ZCCM-IH Mine Rehabilitation Fund — Actuarial Review Report
description: Independent actuarial review of mine rehabilitation closure cost estimates for all 14 tailings storage facilities in the ZCCM-IH portfolio. Preliminary findings indicate a fund shortfall of approximately ZMW 570 million.
